mapper.select: /** EvlPlanDao.select */ select a.evl_plan_id , a.pblanc_id , a.rcept_odr , a.evl_type_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('EVL_TYPE',a.evl_type_cd) as evl_type_nm , a.wct_mdat_dlbrt , a.evl_sttus_cd , a.enabled , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('EVL_STTUS',a.evl_sttus_cd) as evl_sttus_nm , a.creator_id , fn_cmm_get_member_nm(a.creator_id) as charger_nm , b.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , b.pblanc_no /*공고번호*/ , case when b.ordtm_rcrit = true then '상시모집' when b.ordtm_rcrit = false then '정시모집' else '' end as ordtm_rcrit_nm /*상시모집여부*/ , to_char(a.created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as rgsde , a.creator_id as insider_id , b.ordtm_rcrit , a.created_dt , a.updater_id , a.updated_dt from uspt_evl_plan a /*평가계획*/ left outer join uspt_bsns_pblanc b /*사업공고*/ on a.pblanc_id = b.pblanc_id where 1 = 1 and a.evl_plan_id = #{evlPlanId}

/** EvlPlanDao.selectPblancTargetList */ select * from ( select ues.evl_step_id , ues.evl_step_nm , ues.sort_ordr_no , ues.slctn_target_co , us.sect_id , us.sect_nm , '' as evl_last_slctn_id from uspt_evl_plan uep inner join uspt_evl_step ues on uep.evl_plan_id = ues.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_sect us on uep.evl_plan_id = us.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_evl_cmit uec on uec.sect_id = us.sect_id and uec.evl_step_id = ues.evl_step_id and uec.evl_sttus_cd = 'EVST03' where uep.pblanc_id = #{pblancId} and uep.rcept_odr = #{rceptOdr} union all select '' as evl_step_id , '최종선정' as evl_step_nm , 100 as sort_ordr_no , (select count(*) from uspt_last_slctn_trget where evl_last_slctn_id = uels.evl_last_slctn_id and slctn = true) as slctn_target_co , '' as sect_id , '' as sect_nm , uels.evl_last_slctn_id from uspt_evl_plan uep inner join uspt_evl_last_slctn uels on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id and uels.last_slctn = true where uep.evl_type_cd = 'EVTY03' and uep.pblanc_id = #{pblancId} and uep.rcept_odr = #{rceptOdr} ) sub order by sub.sect_id, sub.sort_ordr_no

/** EvlPlanDao.selectStepPblancTarget */ select ues.evl_step_id , ues.evl_step_nm , ues.slctn_target_co , us.sect_id , us.sect_nm from uspt_evl_plan uep inner join uspt_evl_step ues on ues.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id and ues.evl_step_id = #{evlStepId} and ues.evl_step_sttus_cd = 'ESTE03' inner join uspt_sect us on us.evl_plan_id = uep.evl_plan_id and us.sect_id = #{sectId} where uep.pblanc_id = #{pblancId} and uep.rcept_odr = #{rceptOdr}

/** EvlPlanDao.selectLastSlctnPblancTarget */ select uep.pblanc_id , uep.rcept_odr , uep.evl_plan_id , '최종선정' as evl_step_nm , (select count(*) from uspt_last_slctn_trget where evl_last_slctn_id = uels.evl_last_slctn_id and slctn = true) as slctn_target_co , uels.evl_last_slctn_id from uspt_evl_plan uep inner join uspt_evl_last_slctn uels on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id and uels.last_slctn = true where uep.pblanc_id = #{pblancId} and uep.rcept_odr = #{rceptOdr} and uels.evl_last_slctn_id = #{evlLastSlctnId}
